prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The STATS19 data collection and reporting guidelines are applicable across Great Britain, which includes Scotland. The document discusses data specifications relevant to road collision reporting that are implemented by police forces throughout the UK, thereby impacting Scotland as well.
